title: C Main And Output
description: Practice the smallest C program shape with standard output.
learningGoals: Recognize main, printf, and a normal C program return.

completionChecks.prompt: Which function is the entry point in this C program?
completionChecks.explanation: Execution starts in main; printf is just a library call.

completionChecks.prompt: What prints when this program runs?
completionChecks.explanation: printf writes the string literal, including the newline escape.
